tldr_zh: Netflix 以5.87億美元收購AI電影製作新創，OpenAI面臨蘋果訴訟，多項資安漏洞威脅企業系統。
tldr_en: Netflix acquires AI filmmaking startup for $587M, OpenAI faces Apple lawsuit, multiple security vulnerabilities threaten enterprise systems.

items.title_zh: Netflix以5.87億美元收購班艾佛列克AI電影新創InterPositive
items.title_en: Netflix Acquires Ben Affleck's AI Filmmaking Startup InterPositive for $587M
items.summary_zh: Netflix斥資5.87億美元現金收購AI電影製作新創InterPositive，該公司由班艾佛列克共同創辦。此次收購顯示Netflix持續加強AI內容製作能力，進軍影視製作科技領域。
items.summary_en: Netflix paid $587 million in cash for InterPositive, an AI filmmaking startup co-founded by Ben Affleck. This acquisition signals Netflix's commitment to integrating AI into content production and filmmaking technology.

items.title_zh: 蘋果訴訟恐阻礙OpenAI硬體計畫與上市計劃
items.title_en: Apple Lawsuit May Derail OpenAI's Hardware Plans and IPO
items.summary_zh: 蘋果對OpenAI的訴訟可能影響其硬體開發計畫及上市時程。業界分析認為法律糾紛將對OpenAI的長期戰略造成重大影響，特別是在消費者硬體和資本市場方面。
items.summary_en: Apple's lawsuit against OpenAI could potentially derail the AI company's hardware development plans and public offering timeline. Legal challenges may significantly impact OpenAI's strategic expansion into consumer hardware.

items.title_zh: 研究發現AI建議減損批判性思維，用戶信心反而提升
items.title_en: Study Reveals AI Advice Suppresses Critical Thinking While Boosting Confidence
items.summary_zh: 一項研究發現，採納AI建議會降低使用者的準確度，但卻提升他們的信心。此發現凸顯AI使用的雙面效應，用戶可能過度信賴AI而忽略自身判斷能力。
items.summary_en: A new study shows that relying on AI advice makes people less accurate but more confident in their decisions. This reveals a concerning double-sided effect where users may overestimate AI reliability and suppress their own critical thinking.

items.title_zh: HTTP/2伺服器流量控制漏洞恐引發DoS攻擊，多家企業受影響
items.title_en: HTTP/2 Traffic Control Vulnerability Threatens Multiple Enterprise Servers
items.summary_zh: 美國CERT/CC揭露部分HTTP/2伺服器實作存在流量控制漏洞，未經身分驗證的攻擊者可利用特製HTTP請求造成記憶體耗盡和服務中斷。受影響對象包括Apache、Citrix、F5、Meta等多家業者。
items.summary_en: CERT/CC disclosed a traffic control vulnerability in HTTP/2 server implementations that allows unauthenticated remote attackers to cause denial of service through crafted requests. Affected vendors include Apache, Citrix, F5, Meta, Red Hat, and SUSE Linux.

items.title_zh: OpenSSL發現DDoS漏洞HollowByte，11位元組即可癱瘓服務
items.title_en: OpenSSL Patch Secretly Fixes Undisclosed DDoS Vulnerability HollowByte
items.summary_zh: OpenSSL 4.0.1版本實際上修補了未正式登記的漏洞，攻擊者僅需11位元組酬載即可令OpenSSL停止運作。此次安全更新修補18個漏洞，其中CVE-2026-45447由Anthropic Claude AI工具協助發現。
items.summary_en: OpenSSL's latest update secretly patched an undisclosed vulnerability allowing attackers to crash OpenSSL with just 11 bytes of payload. The version 4.0.1 release fixed 18 vulnerabilities, with CVE-2026-45447 discovered using Anthropic's Claude AI tool.

items.title_zh: Google將NotebookLM改名為Gemini Notebook，整合入主生態
items.title_en: Google Rebrands NotebookLM as Gemini Notebook with Cross-Platform Integration
items.summary_zh: Google宣布將受歡迎的NotebookLM改名為Gemini Notebook，並整合進Gemini App和Google搜尋中。該服務已有3,000萬人及60多萬企業組織用戶，支援將筆記生成Podcast或簡報影片。
items.summary_en: Google renamed NotebookLM to Gemini Notebook and integrated it into the Gemini app and Google Search. With 30 million users and 600,000+ organizations, the service enables generating podcasts and presentation videos from notes.

items.title_zh: WordPress修補遠端程式碼執行漏洞wp2shell
items.title_en: WordPress Patches Critical Remote Code Execution Vulnerability wp2shell
items.summary_zh: WordPress開發團隊發布安全更新修補CVE-2026-63030和CVE-2026-60137兩個漏洞，其中包含遠端程式碼執行風險的漏洞wp2shell。網站管理員需立即套用更新以保護網站安全。
items.summary_en: WordPress released critical security updates (7.0.2, 6.9.5, 6.8.6) patching two vulnerabilities including the remote code execution flaw wp2shell. Site administrators are urged to apply updates immediately.

items.title_zh: 美國駐中東軍隊因伊朗攻擊傷亡，美軍連8晚空襲報復
items.title_en: Three US Soldiers Killed in Iranian Attacks; US Military Strikes Back for Eighth Consecutive Night
items.summary_zh: 伊朗攻擊造成駐約旦美軍至少兩人身亡、駐伊拉克一士兵殉職。美軍回應已連續第八晚對伊朗發動空襲。伊朗革命衛隊聲稱對敘利亞坦夫地區的敵軍設施發動突襲進行報復。
items.summary_en: Iranian attacks killed at least three US soldiers stationed in Jordan and Iraq. The US military has launched airstrikes against Iran for eight consecutive nights in retaliation. Iran's Revolutionary Guard claimed responsibility for striking military targets in Syria's Al-Tanf region.

items.title_zh: 俄羅斯對烏克蘭城市發動大規模彈道飛彈攻擊
items.title_en: Russia Launches Major Ballistic Missile Attack on Ukrainian Cities
items.summary_zh: 俄軍對烏克蘭多座城市發動飛彈和無人機攻擊，造成8人喪生、數十人受傷。烏克蘭持續對俄羅斯基礎設施發動反擊。雙方持續升級軍事行動，衝突持續激化。
items.summary_en: Russia launched a major ballistic missile and drone assault on Ukrainian cities, killing 8 people and injuring dozens. Ukraine continues its own attacks on Russian infrastructure as the conflict escalates.

items.title_zh: Tate兄弟在美遭捕，英國起訴罪名增至59項
items.title_en: Tate Brothers Arrested in US; UK Charges Total 59 Counts
items.summary_zh: 美國警方逮捕網紅Tate兄弟，英國檢察署要求引渡。兩人涉及新增強姦和人口販運指控，罪名總數達59項。兩人辯護律師稱其無罪。
items.summary_en: Andrew and Tristan Tate were arrested in the US by federal marshals. The UK's Crown Prosecution Service has requested their extradition amid rape and human trafficking charges totaling 59 counts. Their lawyer claims innocence.

items.title_zh: 萊茵河水位創近年新低，熱浪衝擊德國經濟
items.title_en: Rhine River Hits 7-Year Low; Heat Wave Threatens German Economy
items.summary_zh: 極端氣候導致萊茵河水位降至近7年新低，影響貨船運力，物流成本大幅上升。專家警告頻繁的熱浪與乾旱將進一步衝擊德國疲弱的經濟。
items.summary_en: Extreme weather has caused the Rhine River to reach its lowest level in 7 years, forcing cargo ships to reduce loads and increasing logistics costs. Experts warn that increasingly frequent heat waves and droughts threaten Germany's struggling economy.
